signals.text: GPT-5.5 launch + Codex enterprise rollout (4M WAU) + FedRAMP authorization = major product cycle
Workspace agents, Privacy Filter open-weight model, and GPT-Rosalind for life sciences signal vertical expansion
Microsoft partnership amendment and Cloudflare/Accenture/PwC enterprise partnerships solidify infrastructure dominance
GPT-5.4-Cyber with $10M grants and bio bug bounty show aggressive safety theater amid capability scaling
Complete radio silence during OpenAI's multi-vertical blitz suggests either strategic patience or momentum loss

winner.name: OpenAI
winner.text: Released more products in one day than some competitors ship in a quarter—apparently subtlety is for companies without FedRAMP authorization.

loser.name: Anthropic
loser.text: While OpenAI announced 40 things, Anthropic perfected the art of constitutional silence—very on-brand, just not very loud.
